narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 3-B (precinct in Portage County) has 1,264 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
